title: ooc — live demo
description: Room OOC chat with say and pose forms, wrapped in a recognisable <OOC> tag.

steps.note: ooc <message> broadcasts to the room wrapped in a recognisable <OOC> tag, so RP and OOC chatter never get mixed up.
Prefix the message with a colon to pose instead of speak. The tag stays, but the sentence reads as an action.
Calling ooc with no message prints a usage hint instead of broadcasting an empty line.
